title: A Sea Shift: Maritime Fuels Collaborative Launches to Accelerate Clean Energy Transition across the Pacific Northwest Maritime Industry
content: A new initiative facilitated by Washington Maritime Blue and with leadership from Port of Seattle, Northwest Seaport Alliance, Port of Tacoma, Washington Department of Commerce and the Consortium for Hydrogen and Renewably Generated E-fuels CHARGE called the Sustainable Maritime Fuels Collaborative (SMF Collaborative). The SMF Collaborative will help guide the region's maritime industry towards net-zero emissions by 2050, ensuring the Pacific Northwest remains globally competitive while confronting climate change and advancing environmental justice.
author: Analysts Account
